case_title: CESPEDES, JUAN vs. GEISINGER, RANDY et al

docket_entries.description: RM 501 JAMES MCBRIDE, JUDGE, CARL LACY, CLERK CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, BRENDA KEITH FOR PLAINTIFF, HARRY MILLER FOR DEFENSE. PARTIES AND COUNSEL ORDERED PRESENT 20-JUL-99 AT 9:00 AM.
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO JUL-20-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL, CONT'D PER ROOM #206

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEISINGER, RANDY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 417 GOUGH STREET, APT 326, STAYED UNTIL AUG-18-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF. MOVES BY 18-AUG, JUDGMENT MAY BE SET ASIDE AND VACAT ED BY STIPULATION.
